---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve. For example:  
*"I need to export trained SOC models to ONNX format so that I can deploy them in a C++ inference engine, but WIDSS currently only saves `.keras` files."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like and how it would work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or references here (papers, links to similar tools, etc.).
